_comment: Modern/KJV spellings and forms mapped to the 1828's actual headwords. Used by webster-mcp as a labeled lookup fallback: the tool says 'X is not an 1828 headword; showing Y'. Curated 2026-06-12 during the OCR repair; every target verified present in webster1828.json.gz. Sources: webstersdictionary1828.com cross-reference stubs (e.g. its ALLEGE entry reads '[See Alledge]') and 1828 orthography.
